children.text: responded to the emergency involved; and
as indicated by guidelines developed by the Secretary, may have been exposed to an infectious disease.

children.heading: Certain contents of notification to employee
children.label: b Certain contents of notification to employee

children.text: the fact that the employee may have been exposed to an infectious disease and the name of the disease involved;
any action by the employee that, as indicated by guidelines developed by the Secretary, is medically appropriate; and
if medically appropriate under such criteria, the date of such emergency.

children.heading: Responses other than notification of exposure
children.label: c Responses other than notification of exposure
children.text: After receiving a response under paragraph (3) or (4) of subsection (d) of , or a response under subsection (g)(1) of such section, the designated officer for the employee shall, to the extent practicable, immediately inform the employee of the response.section 300ff–133 of this title
